description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the ruby:2.3 Docker image. Add a test job that runs only on the master branch in the default test stage. The job configures git with "git config --global user.email \"orta+dangersystems@artsy.net\"" and "git config --global user.name \"Danger.Systems\"", updates apt, installs Node 16 via the Nodesource script and nvm, sets NVM_DIR and PROFILE, installs build-essential and libssl-dev, runs the nvm install script, adds the Yarn APT repository and installs yarn and pngquant, installs bundler version 1.15.4, runs "bundle install", updates the danger gem, sets RUBYOPT='-E utf-8', creates the directory static/json_data, executes "bundle exec rake generate", runs "bundle install" again, builds the Middleman site with "bundle exec middleman build --clean --verbose", moves the build output to a public directory, installs netlify-cli globally with npm, and finally deploys the public folder to Netlify using "netlify deploy --site 83354caf-7886-446f-99eb-f91a58b2a682 --auth $NETLIFY_ACCESS_TOKEN --dir public". No caches or artifacts are defined.
